project.title: Transcriptome and Proteomic Analysis Reveals Up-Regulation of Innate Immunity Related Genes Expression in Caprine Herpesvirus 1 Infected Madin Darby Bovine Kidney Cells
project.projectDescription: In order to further understanding the replication and pathogenesis of Caprine herpesvirus 1 (CpHV-1)  and virus-host interactions. In this study,  the proteomics of CpHV-1 infected Madin Darby bovine kidney (MDBK) cells was explored by using iTRAQ-LC-MS/MS technology.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Sample source: bovine kidney cells. The protein was extracted by the total protein extraction kit of mammalian tissue from Beijing bangfei Biotechnology Co., Ltd(ap0601-50). Each sample was separated by nanoliter flow HPLC system. The column was equilibrated with 95% a. The sample was loaded into the mass spectrometry pre column by the automatic injector, and then separated by the analytical column; Each sample was separated by capillary high performance liquid chromatography and analyzed by mass spectrometry. Orbitrap fusion Lumos mass spectrometer of Thermo Scientific manufacturer was used.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The database used this time is uniprot-bovin20180410 and search software is Proteome Discover. Here are the search parameters: Enzyme: Trypsin; Max Missed Cleavages: 2; Fixed modifications: Carbamidomethyl(C),iTRAQ8plex(N-term), iTRAQ8plex(K), iTRAQ8plex (Y); Variable modifications: Oxidation (M), Acetyl:(Protein N-term); Peptide Mass Tolerance: ± 15 ppm; Fragment Mass Tolerance: 20mmu; peptide confidence: high. Results the filtration parameter was Peptide FDR≤0.01.

Characteristics[Specimen]: Each cell sample (pooled of the cells in one plate)
Characteristics[Label]: iTRAQ Reagent-8Plex Multiplex kit (Cat No. 4390812, AB Sciex, Framingham, MA, USA)
Comment[Instrument]: EASY-nLCTM1200 UHPLC system (Thermo Fisher, Rockford, IL, USA)
Q Exactive HF (X) mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher, Rockford, IL, USA)
Comment[FractionationMethod]: fractionated using a C18 column (Waters BEH C18 4.6 × 250 mm, 5 μm) on an HPLC system
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: mass tolerance for precursor ion was 10 ppm
Comment[FragmentMassTolerance]: mass tolerance for product ion was 0.02 Da
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: A maximum of 2 miscleavage sites were allowed.
